faqs.question: How do I know if I have a clothes moth problem in my Eastchester home?
faqs.answer: Signs of clothes moth infestation include small irregular holes in wool clothing, carpets, or upholstery, silken tubes or cases on fabrics, adult moths flying near closets (especially at dusk), and webbing in fabric corners. You may also notice larvae that look like small cream-colored worms on your garments or see shed larval skins in affected areas.
